skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies.

skill1.note: 'for 1 round(s)' approximated as 5s — no round primitive (⚑4). Coexists additively with the 10.06% line per DBG-verified staged baseline.
Stated 10s duration; same-stat pair coexists (no same-caster-slot swallow).

skill1.kitLine: Activates when performing a normal attack during Full Burst. Affects all allies.
skill1.where: skill1[1] trigger shotFired + fbGate inFb / target allies

skill1.kitLine: Pierce Damage ▲ 24.99%, stacks up to 3 time(s), for 1 round(s).
skill1.note: x3 stack; round-scoped dur→5s (⚑4) chosen to span her ~3s swap-cycle gap so consecutive swap shots chain stacks.

skill2.kitLine: Activates after 5 normal attack(s). Affects all allies.
skill2.where: skill2[0] trigger shotFired everyN 5 / target allies
skill2.note: everyN on shotFired = per trigger PULL (correct for 'normal attack(s)'; hitCount 5 would double-count pellets on hitsPerShot 10).
Heal is EVENT-ONLY — the 7.52% cover-HP amount is NOT modeled. Whether cover-HP recovery fires ally on-recovery consumers (e.g. Crown) is unverified HYPOTHESIS ⚑6.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects all allies.
Activates when performing a normal attack while in Pierce Attacks 101 status. Affects all allies.
skill2.where: skill2[2] trigger shotFired + fbGate inFb / target allies
skill2.note: 'Pierce Attacks 101 status' gate (her own burst's 10s team buff) has no status-gate primitive → proxied by in-Full-Burst gate (⚑5). Exact only for a sole-B1 team; multi-B1 teams over-credit.

skill2.kitLine: Critical Rate ▲ 15% for 5 sec, stacks up to 3 time(s).

burst.note: Charge-cannon swap; durationSec 10 is an UNSTATED estimate (⚑3 TOP, RRH-class default).
Explicit kit text; the analogous invented unlimitedAmmo (≈8-shot optimistic bound) was deliberately NOT shipped (arcana-fortune-mate precedent).

burst.where: hasPierce:true (top-level); also kept verbatim in burst.unmodeled
burst.note: Tags the SWAPPED cannon in-kit; no swap-scoped pierce primitive → unit-wide flag. Line retained verbatim in unmodeled per mari precedent ('a flag is not a block'). Leakage ≈0: SG gets no pierce double-hit (sim.ts 1698); flag only feeds pierceDamagePct, and all her pierce buffs are FB/burst-window-scoped (⚑7).

burst.kitLine: Pierce Attacks 101: Pierce Damage ▲ 25.03% for 10 sec.
burst.note: The named 'Pierce Attacks 101' status is itself the S2c gate (see ⚑5); the stat/duration are modeled verbatim.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: weapon-swap window economy is an unmeasured estimate — duration 10s (unstated in kit) and ~3 shots/window (charge 1.2s + 1-ammo reload); if footage shows reload-free cadence it is ~8 shots
documentedConfounds.why: ⚑3 TOP. Directly scales Zwei's personal damage: ~3 vs ~8 shots/window is a ~2.7x swing in her own output. Largest single fidelity risk; no recording to resolve it.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: 'for 1 round(s)' round-scoped buff durations approximated as 5s (no round primitive in the schema)
documentedConfounds.why: ⚑4. Affects pierceDamagePct uptime on the 20.13% and 24.99%-stack lines, but these are FB-window-scoped (FB=10s) and 5s was chosen to span her ~3s swap-cycle gap; second-order, unlikely to drive a large gap.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the Crit Rate stack's 'Pierce Attacks 101 status' gate is proxied by an in-Full-Burst gate — exact only when Zwei is the team's sole Burst I
documentedConfounds.why: ⚑5. In multi-B1 teams the in-FB proxy over-credits the 15% x3 crit-rate stacks (real window starts ~2-3s earlier, ends ~7s into FB). Team-dependent; could overstate team crit rate / damage in non-sole-B1 comps.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: the every-5-attacks heal recovers COVER HP in-kit; whether that fires teammates' on-recovery triggers is an unverified hypothesis
documentedConfounds.why: ⚑6. Heal amount is event-only (not modeled). If cover-HP recovery DOES fire ally recovery consumers (e.g. Crown), a real buff source is silently absent → potential under-credit; if it doesn't, neutral. Unverified either way.

documentedConfounds.text: unit: pierce applies only to the swapped burst cannon in-kit; modeled as unit-wide hasPierce (her pierce buffs are burst-window-scoped, so spillover onto normal shotgun fire is minimal)
documentedConfounds.why: ⚑7. Leakage ≈0: engine gives SG no pierce double-hit (sim.ts 1698); the flag only feeds pierceDamagePct and every pierce buff in her kit is FB/burst-window-scoped, exactly when she is swapped.

documentedConfounds.text: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). NO recording yet — every ⚑ is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number.
documentedConfounds.why: Open question: the entire override is an unvalidated parser baseline with zero measured/recording backing. Any of the ⚑ estimates (esp. ⚑3 swap economy) could be wrong until measured.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1 '【Phase 3】Items ×110', skill2 '【Phase 2】Items ×50', burst '【Phase 1】' cost-progression flavor; burst 'Cooldown: 20 s'
documentedConfounds.why: Inert limit-break/cost flavor lines (no sim effect) plus 'Cooldown: 20 s' which is already burstCooldownSec 20 in char data. Zero hard-rule-class lines in unmodeled; 'Additional Effect: Pierce' is the only burst unmodeled line with a real effect and it is carried by hasPierce config.

authorIntentSummary: The author modeled Zwei as a Burst I SG Supporter whose value is team pierce-damage and crit-rate buffs plus a self charge-cannon weapon swap: S1 = FB-enter team Pierce Damage (20.13% round-scoped→5s + 10.06%/10s, additive) and per-normal-attack-in-FB stacking Pierce Damage 24.99% x3; S2 = every-5-attacks team heal (event-only), FB-enter team Crit Rate 18.63%/10s, and per-normal-attack Crit Rate 15%/5s x3 gated on 'Pierce Attacks 101'; Burst = self weaponSwap (50.69%/shot, 1.2s charge, 300% full-charge, 1 ammo, 10s est) + team Pierce Damage 25.03%/10s, with pierce carried as a unit-wide hasPierce flag. Key approximations: round-scoped durations→5s (⚑4), the 'Pierce Attacks 101 status' gate proxied by an in-Full-Burst gate exact only for sole-B1 teams (⚑5), heal amount not modeled with cover-HP→recovery-trigger firing an open hypothesis (⚑6), and the swap shot-economy (~3 vs ~8 shots/window) as the top unmeasured estimate (⚑3). The whole override is an unvalidated parser baseline with no recording yet — every ⚑ is a HYPOTHESIS pending measurement.
